news.t: AVANTIS INVESTORS LAUNCHES NEW ACTIVE ETF

holdings.infoBox: AVDS is an equity ETF with a total of 3048 individual holdings. The top holdings are AT & S Austria Technologie & Systemtechnik Aktiengesellschaft stock at 0.65%, Taiyo Yuden at 0.56%, Enlight Renewable Energy at 0.42%, Sumco at 0.33%, and Coeur Mining at 0.33%.

overview.description: The Avantis International Small Cap Equity ETF (AVDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of small-cap stocks outside the US. AVDS was launched on Jul 18, 2023 and is issued by American Century Investments.
